title: Exercises: Von Neumann Entropy
description: Practice calculating and analyzing von Neumann entropy for quantum systems

exercises.title: Entropy Calculator

    # Your code here

# Test with various states
rho_pure = np.array([[1, 0], [0, 0]])
rho_mixed = np.eye(2) / 2
rho_partial = np.array([[0.7, 0.3], [0.3, 0.3]])

for name, rho in [('Pure', rho_pure), ('Mixed', rho_mixed), ('Partial', rho_partial)]:

exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

def von_neumann_entropy(rho, base=2):
    """
    Calculate von Neumann entropy.
    """
    rho = np.array(rho)
    
    # Get eigenvalues
    eigenvalues = np.linalg.eigvalsh(rho)
    
    # Filter positive eigenvalues
    eigenvalues = eigenvalues[eigenvalues > 1e-15]
    
    # Compute entropy
    if base == 2:
        entropy = -np.sum(eigenvalues * np.log2(eigenvalues))
    elif base == np.e:
        entropy = -np.sum(eigenvalues * np.log(eigenvalues))
    else:
        entropy = -np.sum(eigenvalues * np.log(eigenvalues)) / np.log(base)
    
    return entropy

def purity(rho):
    """Calculate purity Tr(ρ²)."""
    rho = np.array(rho)
    return np.real(np.trace(rho @ rho))

def is_valid_density_matrix(rho, tol=1e-10):
    """Check if rho is a valid density matrix."""
    rho = np.array(rho)
    
    # Check Hermitian
    if not np.allclose(rho, rho.conj().T, atol=tol):
        return False, "Not Hermitian"
    
    # Check trace = 1
    if not np.isclose(np.trace(rho), 1, atol=tol):
        return False, f"Trace = {np.trace(rho)}, not 1"
    
    # Check positive semidefinite (all eigenvalues >= 0)
    eigenvalues = np.linalg.eigvalsh(rho)
    if np.any(eigenvalues < -tol):
        return False, f"Negative eigenvalue: {eigenvalues.min()}"
    
    return True, "Valid"

# Test
print("Von Neumann Entropy Calculator")
print("="*50)

states = [
    ('Pure |0⟩', np.array([[1, 0], [0, 0]])),
    ('Pure |+⟩', np.array([[0.5, 0.5], [0.5, 0.5]])),
    ('Maximally mixed', np.eye(2) / 2),
    ('Partially mixed', np.array([[0.8, 0], [0, 0.2]])),
    ('Coherent mixed', np.array([[0.7, 0.2], [0.2, 0.3]]))
]

print(f"{'State':<20} | {'S (bits)':<10} | {'Purity':<10} | {'Valid?':<10}")
print("-"*55)

for name, rho in states:
    S = von_neumann_entropy(rho)
    gamma = purity(rho)
    valid, msg = is_valid_density_matrix(rho)
    print(f"{name:<20} | {S:<10.4f} | {gamma:<10.4f} | {msg:<10}")

# Verify properties
print("\nProperty Verification:")
print(f"Max entropy for d=2: log₂(2) = {np.log2(2):.4f}")
print(f"Mixed state entropy: {von_neumann_entropy(np.eye(2)/2):.4f}")
hints: Filter out zero eigenvalues before taking log
Check Hermiticity, trace, and positive semidefiniteness

exercises.title: Entanglement Entropy
exercises.description: Implement computation of entanglement entropy for pure bipartite states using partial trace and Schmidt decomposition.

# Test states
psi_product = np.array([1, 0, 0, 0])  # |00⟩
psi_bell = np.array([1, 0, 0, 1]) / np.sqrt(2)  # Bell state
psi_partial = np.array([np.cos(np.pi/6), 0, 0, np.sin(np.pi/6)])  # Partially entangled

for name, psi in [('Product', psi_product), ('Bell', psi_bell), ('Partial', psi_partial)]:

    print(f"{name}: E = {E:.4f} bits")
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

def partial_trace(rho_AB, dims, trace_out):
    """
    Compute partial trace.
    """
    dim_A, dim_B = dims
    rho = rho_AB.reshape(dim_A, dim_B, dim_A, dim_B)
    
    if trace_out == 1:  # Trace out B, keep A
        return np.trace(rho, axis1=1, axis2=3)
    else:  # Trace out A, keep B
        return np.trace(rho, axis1=0, axis2=2)

def von_neumann_entropy(rho):
    """Calculate von Neumann entropy."""
    eigenvalues = np.linalg.eigvalsh(rho)
    eigenvalues = eigenvalues[eigenvalues > 1e-15]
    return -np.sum(eigenvalues * np.log2(eigenvalues))

def entanglement_entropy(psi_AB, dims):
    """
    Calculate entanglement entropy for pure bipartite state.
    """
    # Density matrix
    rho_AB = np.outer(psi_AB, psi_AB.conj())
    
    # Reduced density matrix
    rho_A = partial_trace(rho_AB, dims, trace_out=1)
    
    # Entanglement entropy
    return von_neumann_entropy(rho_A)

def schmidt_decomposition(psi_AB, dims):
    """
    Compute Schmidt decomposition using SVD.
    """
    dim_A, dim_B = dims
    
    # Reshape state vector to matrix
    psi_matrix = psi_AB.reshape(dim_A, dim_B)
    
    # SVD
    U, s, Vh = np.linalg.svd(psi_matrix, full_matrices=False)
    
    return s, U, Vh.conj().T

# Test
print("Entanglement Entropy Analysis")
print("="*50)

states = [
    ('Product |00⟩', np.array([1, 0, 0, 0])),
    ('Bell |Φ+⟩', np.array([1, 0, 0, 1]) / np.sqrt(2)),
    ('Partial (θ=π/6)', np.array([np.cos(np.pi/6), 0, 0, np.sin(np.pi/6)])),
    ('Partial (θ=π/4)', np.array([np.cos(np.pi/4), 0, 0, np.sin(np.pi/4)])),
    ('Partial (θ=π/3)', np.array([np.cos(np.pi/3), 0, 0, np.sin(np.pi/3)]))
]

print(f"{'State':<20} | {'E (bits)':<10} | {'Schmidt coeffs':<25}")
print("-"*60)

for name, psi in states:
    E = entanglement_entropy(psi, (2, 2))
    schmidt_coeffs, _, _ = schmidt_decomposition(psi, (2, 2))
    coeffs_str = ', '.join([f'{c:.3f}' for c in schmidt_coeffs if c > 1e-10])
    print(f"{name:<20} | {E:<10.4f} | [{coeffs_str}]")

# Plot entanglement vs theta
print("\nEntanglement vs mixing angle:")
thetas = np.linspace(0, np.pi/2, 9)
for theta in thetas:
    psi = np.array([np.cos(theta), 0, 0, np.sin(theta)])
    E = entanglement_entropy(psi, (2, 2))
    print(f"  θ = {theta:.4f}: E = {E:.4f} bits")
hints: Reshape density matrix to (dim_A, dim_B, dim_A, dim_B) for partial trace
Use np.trace with axis1 and axis2 for partial trace
Schmidt coefficients are the singular values of the reshaped state

exercises.title: Entropy Properties Verification
exercises.description: Verify the key properties of von Neumann entropy: concavity, subadditivity, Araki-Lieb inequality, and the relationship to measurement entropy.
exercises.starterCode:

exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

def von_neumann_entropy(rho):
    eigenvalues = np.linalg.eigvalsh(rho)
    eigenvalues = eigenvalues[eigenvalues > 1e-15]
    return -np.sum(eigenvalues * np.log2(eigenvalues))

def partial_trace(rho_AB, dims, trace_out):
    dim_A, dim_B = dims
    rho = rho_AB.reshape(dim_A, dim_B, dim_A, dim_B)
    if trace_out == 1:
        return np.trace(rho, axis1=1, axis2=3)
    else:
        return np.trace(rho, axis1=0, axis2=2)

def verify_concavity(rho1, rho2, p):
    """Verify concavity of entropy."""
    rho_mix = p * rho1 + (1-p) * rho2
    
    S_mix = von_neumann_entropy(rho_mix)
    S_weighted = p * von_neumann_entropy(rho1) + (1-p) * von_neumann_entropy(rho2)
    
    satisfied = S_mix >= S_weighted - 1e-10
    
    return {
        'S(mixture)': S_mix,
        'weighted_sum': S_weighted,
        'difference': S_mix - S_weighted,
        'satisfied': satisfied
    }

def verify_subadditivity(rho_AB, dims):
    """Verify subadditivity."""
    rho_A = partial_trace(rho_AB, dims, trace_out=1)
    rho_B = partial_trace(rho_AB, dims, trace_out=0)
    
    S_AB = von_neumann_entropy(rho_AB)
    S_A = von_neumann_entropy(rho_A)
    S_B = von_neumann_entropy(rho_B)
    
    satisfied = S_AB <= S_A + S_B + 1e-10
    
    return {
        'S(AB)': S_AB,
        'S(A)': S_A,
        'S(B)': S_B,
        'S(A)+S(B)': S_A + S_B,
        'satisfied': satisfied
    }

def verify_araki_lieb(rho_AB, dims):
    """Verify Araki-Lieb inequality."""
    rho_A = partial_trace(rho_AB, dims, trace_out=1)
    rho_B = partial_trace(rho_AB, dims, trace_out=0)
    
    S_AB = von_neumann_entropy(rho_AB)
    S_A = von_neumann_entropy(rho_A)
    S_B = von_neumann_entropy(rho_B)
    
    lhs = abs(S_A - S_B)
    satisfied = lhs <= S_AB + 1e-10
    
    return {
        '|S(A)-S(B)|': lhs,
        'S(AB)': S_AB,
        'satisfied': satisfied
    }

def measurement_entropy(rho, measurement_basis):
    """Calculate entropy of measurement outcomes."""
    probs = []
    for basis_state in measurement_basis:
        basis_state = np.array(basis_state)
        prob = np.real(basis_state.conj() @ rho @ basis_state)
        probs.append(prob)
    
    probs = np.array(probs)
    probs = probs[probs > 1e-15]
    
    return -np.sum(probs * np.log2(probs))

# Run tests
print("Von Neumann Entropy Properties Verification")
print("="*60)

# Test 1: Concavity
print("\n1. CONCAVITY")
rho1 = np.array([[1, 0], [0, 0]])  # |0⟩
rho2 = np.array([[0, 0], [0, 1]])  # |1⟩

for p in [0.2, 0.5, 0.8]:
    result = verify_concavity(rho1, rho2, p)
    print(f"   p={p}: S(mix)={result['S(mixture)']:.4f}, weighted={result['weighted_sum']:.4f}, "
          f"diff={result['difference']:.4f}, OK={result['satisfied']}")

# Test 2: Subadditivity
print("\n2. SUBADDITIVITY")
# Product state
rho_product = np.outer([1,0,0,0], [1,0,0,0])
print("   Product state:")
result = verify_subadditivity(rho_product, (2,2))
print(f"   S(AB)={result['S(AB)']:.4f}, S(A)+S(B)={result['S(A)+S(B)']:.4f}, OK={result['satisfied']}")

# Bell state
psi_bell = np.array([1, 0, 0, 1]) / np.sqrt(2)
rho_bell = np.outer(psi_bell, psi_bell.conj())
print("   Bell state:")
result = verify_subadditivity(rho_bell, (2,2))
print(f"   S(AB)={result['S(AB)']:.4f}, S(A)+S(B)={result['S(A)+S(B)']:.4f}, OK={result['satisfied']}")

# Mixed state
rho_mixed = np.eye(4) / 4
print("   Maximally mixed:")
result = verify_subadditivity(rho_mixed, (2,2))
print(f"   S(AB)={result['S(AB)']:.4f}, S(A)+S(B)={result['S(A)+S(B)']:.4f}, OK={result['satisfied']}")

# Test 3: Araki-Lieb
print("\n3. ARAKI-LIEB INEQUALITY")
result = verify_araki_lieb(rho_bell, (2,2))
print(f"   Bell: |S(A)-S(B)|={result['|S(A)-S(B)|']:.4f}, S(AB)={result['S(AB)']:.4f}, OK={result['satisfied']}")

# Test 4: Measurement entropy
print("\n4. MEASUREMENT ENTROPY vs VON NEUMANN ENTROPY")
rho = np.array([[0.7, 0.3], [0.3, 0.3]])
comp_basis = [np.array([1, 0]), np.array([0, 1])]
plus_basis = [np.array([1, 1])/np.sqrt(2), np.array([1, -1])/np.sqrt(2)]

S_vn = von_neumann_entropy(rho)
S_comp = measurement_entropy(rho, comp_basis)
S_plus = measurement_entropy(rho, plus_basis)

print(f"   S(ρ) = {S_vn:.4f}")
print(f"   H(comp basis) = {S_comp:.4f}")
print(f"   H(+/- basis) = {S_plus:.4f}")
print(f"   S(ρ) ≤ min(H_meas): {S_vn:.4f} ≤ {min(S_comp, S_plus):.4f}: {S_vn <= min(S_comp, S_plus) + 1e-10}")
hints: Subadditivity: joint entropy ≤ sum of marginal entropies
